afterSwap(address,(address,address,uint2.notice: Called by PoolManager after every swap.         Routes MEV premium to InsuranceFund if MEV was detected.

beforeSwap(address,(address,address,uint.notice: Called by PoolManager before every swap.         Returns a dynamic fee override (requires pool to have DYNAMIC_FEE_FLAG).

getHookPermissions().notice: Declares which V4 hooks this contract implements.         BEFORE_SWAP + AFTER_SWAP → address bits 7 and 6 must be set.

validateHookAddress().notice: Returns true when this contract is deployed at an address whose lower         14 bits match exactly BEFORE_SWAP | AFTER_SWAP (= 0x00C0).         Call this after deployment to verify V4 hook address correctness.
